aeo_readiness.summary: The business has a basic foundation for AEO with clear service offerings and contact information but lacks customer reviews and detailed content to build authority.
quick_wins: Generate and showcase customer reviews on the website and Google Business Profile.
Expand service pages with detailed content, FAQs, and keyword optimization.
Implement a blog to address common air quality concerns and improve keyword relevance.

gbp_analysis.found: No Google Business Profile (GBP) found based on the provided information.
gbp_analysis.summary: The absence of a GBP significantly impacts local search visibility and customer trust.
critical_issues: No GBP listing to capture local search traffic.
Missing opportunity to collect and display customer reviews.
Lack of GBP insights to understand customer behavior and preferences.

nap_citations.summary: The business has consistent NAP (Name, Address, Phone Number) on its website but lacks citations on major directories and platforms.
action_items: Create and verify listings on major directories like Yelp, Bing Places, and Apple Maps.
Ensure NAP consistency across all online platforms and directories.
Encourage local partnerships and sponsorships to gain additional citation opportunities.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of customer reviews and detailed content to establish authority and improve search rankings.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Users searching for air duct and dryer vent cleaning services in Naperville, IL.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing a review generation strategy and optimizing existing service pages with relevant keywords.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Creating high-quality, informative content (e.g., blog posts, guides) that addresses common customer questions and establishes the business as an expert in indoor air quality.

page_title: #1 Air Duct & Dryer Vent Cleaning Services | Naperville, IL
